emails.subject: 98-6892 for 3/15/2000 and 3/23/2000
emails.body: 98-6892 for 3/15/2000 and 3/23/2000 Daren, I know it's first of the month but the above meter has flow for 3/15 (71 dec.) and 3/23 (35 dec.) but the deal (Sitara #213005) doesn't cover these two days. Can you see if it is feasible to activate these two days in Sitara so that I can clear my exceptions for Volume Management? Thanks -Jackie- 3-9497
